name: Grak Ironfist
sd_appearance: A towering orcish figure, 8 feet tall, his deep moss-green skin etched with the jagged scar of a thousand battles, tusks cracked and dulled by years of metal-grinding, eyes glowing with a sickly bioluminescent green that pierces the gloom of the Undercity's crumbling alleyways. His silver-plated armor, scavenged from fallen foes, is a patchwork of reinforced plates and frayed leather, adorned with a single blue-tinted arena medal pinned haphazardly to his chest, while a rusted chainmail hauberk hangs loose over his broad shoulders. A jagged dagger rests at his hip, its edge dulled by recent use, and a satchel of brittle maps and ink-stained parchment clings to his belt, its frayed strap revealing a hidden crack in the Dome’s barrier, etched into the metal with obsessive precision.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: eclectic — no faction marks, which is itself a statement
